summary: Aggregate/Average toggle fix verified. The issue was that the frontend build was stale and didn't include the avg_pw_vs_si code changes. After rebuilding the frontend, the PW-vs-SI tables and Inter-Model Agreement tables now correctly change values when switching between Aggregate and Average mode.
critical_code_review_comments: The frontend code in PwVsSiSection.jsx and InterModelSection.jsx was correct - it properly checks viewMode and uses avgData when in average mode
The issue was a stale frontend build - the build was from April 5 but the source files were modified on April 6
After running 'yarn build' and restarting the frontend, the toggle works correctly
test_credentials: No auth needed for /api/model-analysis or /correlation page
context_for_next_testing_agent: The Aggregate/Average toggle on the Model Correlation page now works correctly. Key findings: (1) Backend API correctly returns avg_pw_vs_si and avg_pw_inter_model fields with different rho values than the aggregate pw_vs_si, (2) Frontend code was correct but the build was stale, (3) After rebuilding frontend with 'yarn build', the toggle changes table values as expected: Claude Reg WR goes from 0.817 (Aggregate) to 0.843 (Average), (4) Inter-Model PW table also changes values correctly, (5) For specific categories, avg_pw_vs_si is correctly null (averages only apply to All Categories view)

test_cases: Returns avg_pw_vs_si with per_model and within_model keys
Returns avg_pw_inter_model as non-empty array with 3 rows
avg_pw_vs_si is null for specific category
avg_pw_inter_model is null for specific category
pw_vs_si (aggregate) still works for specific category
Toggle button switches between Aggregate and Average mode
PW-vs-SI tables show different rho values in Average mode
Inter-Model Agreement PW table shows different rho values in Average mode
Tables still render correctly for specific category tabs

root_cause_analysis.issue: PW-vs-SI and Inter-Model Agreement tables did not change values when switching between Aggregate and Average mode
root_cause_analysis.root_cause: Frontend build was stale - the build was created on April 5 at 19:52 but the source files (CorrelationPage.jsx, PwVsSiSection.jsx) were modified on April 6 at 18:35 and 18:48. The built JavaScript did not contain the avg_pw_vs_si code.
root_cause_analysis.fix_applied: Rebuilt frontend with 'yarn build' and restarted frontend service with 'sudo supervisorctl restart frontend'
root_cause_analysis.verification: After rebuild, the toggle correctly changes table values: Claude Reg WR 0.817 (Aggregate) -> 0.843 (Average)
